sentences.text_original: 你钱包里卡怎么这么多？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ qiánbāo lǐ kǎ zěnme zhème duō?
sentences.text_translation: Hamyoningda nega bunchalik ko'p karta bor?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Почему у тебя в кошельке столько карт?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why do you have so many cards in your wallet?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我最近办了一张信用卡，用来买东西很方便。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn bàn le yì zhāng xìnyòngkǎ, yòng lái mǎi dōngxi hěn fāngbiàn.
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda bitta kredit karta ochtirdim, xarid qilishda juda qulay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я недавно оформил кредитную карту, ей очень удобно расплачиваться.
sentences.text_translation_en: I recently got a credit card — it's very convenient for shopping.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你以前没用过信用卡吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǐqián méi yòng guo xìnyòngkǎ ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты раньше не пользовался кредитной картой?
sentences.text_translation_en: Haven't you used a credit card before?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 用过，但是那张已经到期了。新卡额度更高一些。
sentences.pinyin: Yòng guo, dànshì nà zhāng yǐjīng dàoqī le. Xīn kǎ édù gèng gāo yì xiē.
sentences.text_translation: Foydalanganman, lekin u kartaning muddati tugagan. Yangi kartaning limiti biroz balandroq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пользовался, но у той уже истёк срок. У новой карты лимит немного выше.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have, but that one already expired. The new card has a slightly higher limit.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 就是银行最多让你花多少钱。
sentences.pinyin: Jiùshì yínháng zuìduō ràng nǐ huā duōshao qián.
sentences.text_translation: Bu — bank senga ko'pi bilan qancha pul sarflashga ruxsat berishi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это сколько максимум банк позволяет тебе потратить.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's the most the bank lets you spend.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ zhè ge yuè shuā le duōshao?
sentences.text_translation: Unda bu oy qancha kartadan o'tkazding?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А сколько ты потратил с карты в этом месяце?
sentences.text_translation_en: So how much did you swipe this month?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 刷了一千多吧，买了几件衣服和日用品。
sentences.pinyin: Shuā le yì qiān duō ba, mǎi le jǐ jiàn yīfu hé rìyòngpǐn.
sentences.text_translation: Mingdan ko'proq o'tkazdim, bir nechta kiyim va kundalik ehtiyoj mollari oldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Где-то больше тысячи, купил пару вещей и товары повседневного спроса.
sentences.text_translation_en: Over a thousand, I think — I bought some clothes and daily necessities.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你要记得按时还钱，不然利息很高。
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ yào jìde ànshí huán qián, bùrán lìxī hěn gāo.
sentences.text_translation: Unda qarzni o'z vaqtida qaytarishni unutma, aks holda foizi juda baland.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда не забывай вовремя возвращать деньги, иначе проценты очень высокие.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then remember to pay it back on time, otherwise the interest is very high.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我知道，我每个月都会全额还清。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zhīdào, wǒ měi ge yuè dōu huì quán'é huán qīng.
sentences.text_translation: Bilaman, men har oy to'liq summani to'lab qo'yaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я знаю, я каждый месяц погашаю всю сумму полностью.
sentences.text_translation_en: I know — I pay it off in full every month.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那挺好的，还能积累信用记录。
sentences.pinyin: Nà tǐng hǎo de, hái néng jīlěi xìnyòng jìlù.
sentences.text_translation: Bu juda yaxshi, ustiga-ustak kredit tarixi to'planib boradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это хорошо, ещё и кредитную историю можно накопить.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's great — you can also build up a credit record.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，以后买房贷款会比较方便。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, yǐhòu mǎi fáng dàikuǎn huì bǐjiào fāngbiàn.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri, kelajakda uy olish uchun kredit olish ancha qulay bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, потом будет проще взять кредит на покупку жилья.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right, it'll be easier to get a mortgage loan later.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你觉得办信用卡有什么要注意的吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juéde bàn xìnyòngkǎ yǒu shénme yào zhùyì de ma?
sentences.text_translation: Seningcha kredit karta ochishda nimaga e'tibor berish kerak?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты думаешь, на что нужно обращать внимание при оформлении кредитной карты?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you think you should watch out for when getting a credit card?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 要选适合自己消费习惯的卡，年费、积分什么的都要看好。
sentences.pinyin: Yào xuǎn shìhé zìjǐ xiāofèi xíguàn de kǎ, niánfèi, jīfēn shénme de dōu yào kàn hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: O'z xarajat odatlaringga mos kartani tanlash kerak, yillik to'lov, bonus ballari va shu kabilarga ham diqqat qilish lozim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нужно выбрать карту под свои привычки в тратах, и хорошо изучить годовую плату, баллы и тому подобное.
sentences.text_translation_en: You should pick a card that suits your spending habits, and check things like the annual fee and reward points carefully.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: What are reward points good for?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 可以换礼物、换机票，有时候还能抵现金。
sentences.pinyin: Kěyǐ huàn lǐwù, huàn jīpiào, yǒu shíhou hái néng dǐ xiànjīn.
sentences.text_translation: Sovg'a yoki aviachiptaga almashtirsa bo'ladi, ba'zan naqd pul o'rnini ham bosadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можно обменять на подарки, на авиабилеты, иногда даже зачесть вместо наличных.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can redeem them for gifts or plane tickets, and sometimes even use them in place of cash.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 听起来不错，我也想办一张了。
sentences.pinyin: Tīng qǐlái búcuò, wǒ yě xiǎng bàn yì zhāng le.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi eshitilyapti, men ham bittasini ochtirgim keldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Звучит неплохо, мне тоже захотелось оформить.
sentences.text_translation_en: That sounds good — now I want to get one too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你可以先了解几家银行，选个合适的。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ xiān liǎojiě jǐ jiā yínháng, xuǎn ge héshì de.
sentences.text_translation: Avval bir nechta bankni o'rganib chiqib, mos kelganini tanlasang bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сначала можешь изучить несколько банков и выбрать подходящий.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can first look into a few banks and pick a suitable one.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll go and look into it.
sentences.speaker: A
